title: To My Dear Sister, Haripriya
paragraphs: As you reach the end of this little scrapbook, I hope it brought a smile to your face, a laugh to your heart, and maybe even a tiny tear to your eyes.

Building this was my way of stopping time for a moment. In our busy lives, as we grow older and face new responsibilities, it's easy to forget how much we've shared, how much we've laughed, and how strong our bond truly is.

From the games of our childhood to the racing tracks, the festivals, the quiet temple visits, and the silliest reels—every single moment has shaped who we are. You have been my protector, my first best friend, and my constant guide.

I hope that whenever you feel tired, overwhelmed, or lonely, you will open this link. Let these pages remind you that you are deeply loved, appreciated, and that you have a brother who is always in your corner, cheering you on.
Thank you for being the best sister I could ever ask for. Thank you for existing.
